notes: Eclectic global street food, shareable small plates -> venue_format share-plate, course_type 'plate' (salads/desserts mapped accordingly). The menu marks Vegan / Vegetarian / Gluten Free clearly (incl. some 'GF option'/'vegan option') -> recorded as VEG/VEGAN/GF. Thai Mang Da Na priced per count (2/3/4). Adventurous menu (water beetles, krill) - a great fit for the curious-date brief.

dishes.name: Tower of Chengdu Wings
dishes.description: Crispy wings with numbing Sichuan peppercorn, fish sauce, lime, basil, mint and Thai chili. Intentionally spicy; chilies can be omitted.

dishes.name: South African Bunny Chow
dishes.description: Rich chicken masala served in a traditional bread bowl, topped with crema, cilantro and lime zest.

dishes.name: French Tacos
dishes.description: A grilled French street food wrap packed with merguez sausage, crispy fries, cheese sauce, Algerian sauce and ras el hanout carrot-raisin slaw.

dishes.name: Beirut Hummus
dishes.description: Creamy hummus topped with fried garlic, fresh mint, cumin and olive oil, served with warm pita.

dishes.name: Thai Mang Da Na
dishes.description: Large Thai water beetles with an intense fruity, floral, sweet-salty flavor.

dishes.name: Krill Crisp Dip
dishes.description: Savory Antarctic krill dip with yuzu kewpie, water chestnut and panko crunch, served with house-fried wonton skins.

dishes.name: Burmese Tea Leaf Salad
dishes.description: Fermented tea leaf salad with cabbage, Thai chili, fried garlic, peanuts and crunchy roasted seeds and beans.

dishes.name: World Butter Board
dishes.description: A flight of four iconic butters from Italy, Ethiopia, India and France, served with a rustic baguette.

dishes.name: Balinese BBQ Spareribs
dishes.description: Pork ribs marinated in garlic, galangal, lemongrass and turmeric, grilled and basted with a sweet soy glaze, served with rice.

dishes.name: Taiwanese Turkey Rice
dishes.description: Shredded turkey over short-grain rice with savory soy jus, rich turkey drippings and pickled daikon.

dishes.name: Malaysian Dhal
dishes.description: Rich coconut lentil stew with makrut lime leaf, lemongrass, curry leaf, ginger and lemon, served with roti or rice.

dishes.name: Japanese Zosui
dishes.description: Comforting Japanese rice soup with dashi, vegetables, egg, nori and crispy wonton strips. Add Dungeness crab +10.

dishes.name: East Indies Brussels Sprouts
dishes.description: Crispy Brussels sprouts with peanut, sesame and coconut dry chutney, plus peanut satay and sweet chili dipping sauces.

dishes.name: Syrian Kale & Carrot Salad
dishes.description: Fresh kale and carrot salad with pomegranate molasses dressing, cumin, dates, feta and toasted almonds.

dishes.name: Fennel & Paprika Mussels
dishes.description: Prince Edward Island mussels, served in the tin in smoked paprika and fennel tomato conserva, with pita crackers and pickled celery-kohlrabi.

dishes.name: Dutch Patat Oorlog
dishes.description: Fries topped with cool mayo, peanut satay, red onions and sambal oelek.

dishes.name: Caribbean Pineapple Cornbread
dishes.description: Sweet pineapple cornbread with butter and toasted coconut.

dishes.name: Danish Drømmekage
dishes.description: Traditional Danish white caramelized mini cake with marionberry jam.
